title: Laboratory Safety
description: Premium personal protective equipment (PPE) and containment supplies to maintain regulatory compliance and lab safety.

subcategories.name: First Aid & Eyewash Stations
subcategories.description: Emergency response kits, wall-mounted eyewash units, and safety showers for immediate decontamination in chemical spill incidents.

subcategories.name: Protective Clothing & Lab Coats
subcategories.description: Disposable and reusable lab coats, coveralls, and chemical-resistant aprons meeting OSHA and local safety standards.

subcategories.name: Breathing, Eye & Ear Protection
subcategories.description: Half-face and full-face respirators, chemical splash goggles, face shields, and hearing protection for hazardous environments.

subcategories.name: Cryogenic & Nitrile Gloves
subcategories.description: Examination-grade nitrile gloves, chemical-resistant heavy-duty gloves, and insulated cryogenic gloves for liquid nitrogen handling.
